title: Rename device - new name on the FMD disconnected card
scenario: Verify that the Find My Device disconnected card displays the updated device name after renaming and disconnecting the device.
steps: 1. Start the app with a device that has been renamed.
3. Change the device name and disconnect the device.
6. Verify the disconnected card shows the new device name.
expected: The FMD disconnected card should display the new device name instead of the old one.
